inputs.name: DKIM TXT record hostname
inputs.instructions: In the Postmark dashboard, go to Sender Signatures, add your domain, and copy the hostname for the DKIM TXT record (e.g. 20260417161410pm._domainkey).

inputs.name: DKIM TXT record value
inputs.instructions: Copy the value for the DKIM TXT record from the Sender Signatures page in the Postmark dashboard.
